hero.headline: Same-Day Water Heater Service Across
hero.subheadline: LA's most trusted water heater specialists. Same-day install, repair, and replacement for tank and tankless. 819+ five-star reviews. Licensed, insured, and 24/7 emergency ready.
hero.imageAlt: LA Water Heaters licensed plumber installing water heater

servicesSection.label: Our Services
servicesSection.heading: Everything Your Water Heater Could Ever Need
servicesSection.paragraph: From quick repairs to full tankless conversions — we handle it all. Same-day, fully warrantied, with upfront pricing and no surprises.

problemsSection.label: Common Issues
problemsSection.heading: Hot water problems?
problemsSection.paragraph: Whether it's a tank leak at midnight, a tankless throwing error codes, or a dead pilot light on a cold morning — we've seen it, diagnosed it, and fixed it thousands of times across LA.

issues.title: No hot water
issues.desc: Pilot light, thermocouple, gas valve — diagnosed today.

issues.title: Tankless error codes
issues.desc: All brands, all codes — fixed in one visit.

issues.title: Old unit failing
issues.desc: Same-day swap with new energy-efficient model.

issues.title: Need maintenance
issues.desc: Annual service extends life by 5+ years.

brandsSection.label: Brands We Service
brandsSection.heading: Authorized Installer for Every Major Brand
brandsSection.paragraph: Factory-authorized for the brands that matter — full warranty registration, OEM parts, certified technicians.

rebateBanner.label: Tankless Rebates
rebateBanner.heading: Save up to
rebateBanner.paragraph: Stack SoCalGas, LADWP, and federal rebates with manufacturer instant savings. We handle every form — you keep the cash.
